name: break_of_structure_gold
description: Trade continuation after gold breaks the latest swing structure and confirms beyond that level.
entry_rules: Mark the latest swing high or swing low on the active timeframe
Enter after price closes beyond the structure level or after a successful retest
Align with the broader trend whenever possible
exit_rules: Stop below the last higher low for longs or above the last lower high for shorts
Take profit using the next structure target or fixed reward multiple
Invalidate quickly if price falls back through the broken structure
research_notes: This should be treated as a structured trend-continuation model rather than pure breakout trading.
The bot will need clearer swing-point labeling before this is production-ready.
